title: Cheese & Dairy
body:
### What Is Cheese & Dairy?

Cheese & Dairy is simply a mod that adds cheese to the game! (Crafted with sugar and milk)

### Installation:

This mod requires [Java](https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/downloads/), [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/), and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to work.

### Future Update Ideas:

> More types of cheese

> More food with cheese

> More food with dairy

---

_**Note:** This is just a fun project I made using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/), **EXPECT BUGS!**_
